existing_features.title: Implement a mobile-friendly calculator UI with a numeric keypad and operator keys, supporting at minimum: addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, decimal input, clear (AC), delete/backspace, and equals.

Add calculator interaction behavior: input chaining, operator precedence rules (or clearly defined immediate-execution behavior), and consistent handling of repeated equals, sign changes (optional), and clearing states.
Ensure responsive layout and accessibility: support one-handed use on mobile, keyboard input on desktop, and accessible labels for assistive technologies.
Apply a coherent, distinct visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) consistently across the calculator screens and states, avoiding blue/purple as primary colors.
